message:
fix(macaroon,cancel,plan): serialization truncation, timing, strengthen coherence, t_max

- macaroon.rs: replace silent `as u16` truncation with explicit u16::try_from
  assertions in to_binary() and CaveatPredicate::to_bytes() (MEDIUM)
- macaroon.rs: implement constant-time PartialEq for MacaroonSignature instead
  of derived short-circuiting comparison (MEDIUM)
- cancel.rs: copy all fields (origin_region, origin_task, cause, etc.) in
  strengthen() same-severity message tie-break, preventing incoherent state (MEDIUM)
- latency_algebra.rs: use fold(max) instead of .last() for t_max in horizontal
  and vertical deviation to cover all breakpoints (LOW)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
